name: claude-kit
description: Claude Code skills + agents for React 19 / Vite SPA work. Two plugins: react-core (portable) and pps-web-profile (Aware-specific).

plugins.name: react-core
plugins.description: React 19 / Vite SPA skills: perf, composition, audit, revamp, ux-review, dry. Stack-agnostic across any web-React project.

plugins.name: pps-web-profile
plugins.description: Aware pps-web project profile: build/polish/pre-commit agents + UI primitive inventory. Depends on react-core.
